questions.question: What is the primary purpose of a decorator in Python?
options: A. To modify the behavior of a function or class without directly changing its source code
B. To create a new Python package
C. To handle exceptions in a function
D. To declare a static method
questions.explanation: Decorators are a way to modify or extend the behavior of functions or classes, typically by wrapping them with additional functionality, without modifying their original code.
